description_long: This is a modern office swivel chair with a vibrant blue upholstered seat and backrest, both featuring subtle horizontal stitching for added comfort and style. The chair is supported by a black, five-legged star-shaped metal base equipped with smooth-rolling casters for easy mobility. Its armrests are slim, curved, and made of metal with blue padding on the upper surface, seamlessly attached to the seat and backrest. The central support column is black and cylindrical, likely made of metal, providing stability and possibly housing a pneumatic height adjustment mechanism. The backrest is tall and rectangular, offering full back support, while the seat is wide and flat with gentle contouring. This chair is designed for ergonomic seating in urban office environments, conference rooms, or workspaces.
description: A modern blue swivel chair with a tall, rectangular backrest, padded seat, slim metal armrests, and a black five-caster base. Designed for ergonomic comfort and mobility in office or workspace settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chair's blue upholstery, slim metal armrest, and the five-caster black base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide blue seat, tall backrest, and both armrests symmetrically positioned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the blue seat, backrest, and armrest from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full width of the blue backrest and the black base with casters.
attribute_central_support_column: Black cylindrical metal column, likely telescoping for height adjustment, connecting the seat to the five-legged base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, and flat with blue fabric upholstery and subtle horizontal stitching; provides full back support.
attribute_armrest_style: Slim, curved metal armrests with blue padding on top, attached to both the seat and backrest.
